calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-068 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 1/3 H-rem-clamp-artifact: REM unpaired-target null (axis=measurement)
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 discrimination portfolio on the SD-068 REM leg, leg 1 of 3 (axis=MEASUREMENT, hypothesis H-rem-clamp-artifact, pre-registered 2026-07-18T08:41:15Z in hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json question consolidation_readout_validity). Routed by REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-778c_2026-07-18.json targets[0].fanout_recommendation, which left the REM leg DEGENERATE AT BOTH RAILS rather than resolved: null_slope_ratio_rem exactly 0.0 on 5/8 seeds (calibration_error pinned at the constant 998.5009992509989, target_clamped 1.0 -> identically zero slope) and off-scale 1801-9143 on 3/8 (null precision reference collapsed onto the 1e-3 positivity floor). PROBE AMENDED BEFORE QUEUING -- the autopsy's sketched `step` ladder (0.1/0.25/0.5/1.0) is PROVABLY INERT and was replaced during the pre-queue design audit, before any compute was spent. e3_selector.recalibrate_precision_to computes rv_after = (1-step)*rv_before + step*(1/(target+1e-6)), so (a) the max(1e-3, raw) positivity clamp is applied UPSTREAM of step, making the clamp fraction exactly step-invariant, and (b) both arms' sigma-slopes carry the same linear factor step, which CANCELS in the reported |null|/|injected| ratio. Verified numerically over step in {0.1,0.25,0.5,1.0}: ratio identical to 12 significant figures (14569.1833719598-...602, float round-off only), clamp fraction and distinct-value count bit-identical. Running it would have returned this leg's DECLARED NULL by construction -- a FALSE ELIMINATION in the frozen ledger, not a measurement. (A positivity-floor ladder fails identically: the null reference is centred on ZERO, so it clamps on ~half the draws at ANY floor.) The clamp's real root is that MULTIPLICATIVE content scaling sends the null target precision to ZERO, a degenerate point of a strictly-positive parameterisation. REPLACEMENT PROBE: an UNPAIRED-TARGET null -- ARM_NULL_UNPAIRED points the recalibration at an INDEPENDENT positive target of the same magnitude class (log-normal, positive by construction), unpaired with the clean target the error is scored against. This is the faithful Bar et al. 2020 analog SD-068 follows: 'same odour, NO PRIOR PAIRING', not 'no odour'; the delivered perturbation is unchanged and only the content PAIRING is removed. ANTI-ALIAS: (1) ARM_NULL_ZERO (the 778c null) is retained as a REPLICATION ANCHOR on the same 8 seeds and the same RNG stream -- a failed anchor routes to substrate_not_ready_requeue, never a verdict, so a de-rail cannot alias 'the zero-target null was the artifact' against 'this run differs from 778c'; (2) the RATIO is reported, not just the clamp fraction, keeping 'the null was mis-operationalised' separable from 'the readout tracks content' -- two distinct grid branches; (3) the ratio is fitted on the UNCLAMPED SUBGRID with a floor on how many clean points are required, so a slope is never drawn through saturated points. DECLARED NULL: if ARM_NULL_UNPAIRED stays railed too, this leg is REFUTED and the measurement axis is eliminated from the question. LEDGER DEBT: the H-rem-clamp-artifact entry still records the retired step-ladder probe and needs amending to match; this session did NOT write it because an active TASK_CLAIMS entry ('axis-family convergence discriminator', 2026-07-18T08:05:00Z) holds hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json. GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout is the null-arm sigma-slope under an UNPAIRED (non-zero) target; every recorded SD-068 manifest (778, 778a, 778b, 778c) operationalised the null as a ZERO target, so it is not recoverable by reanalysis -> run. Re-derive brake: does NOT fire (SD-068 has 1 autopsy, category measurement_gap / direction weakens, neither of which counts toward the brake; and a diagnostic discriminating WHY a readout reads degenerately is named not-braked). Siblings: V3-EXQ-778e, V3-EXQ-778f. DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic -> excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring); PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING -> resolution via /failure-autopsy Step 9b Mode B against the frozen ledger, NOT by the script's self-route. SD-068 is the subject; MECH-168 / INV-047 / MECH-169 are CONTEXT only. MECH-121 deliberately NOT tagged (held, candidate/substrate_conditional; the NREM leg is substrate-plumbing-fidelity only and must not accrue promotion evidence). rem phase ONLY -- the sws repair is a single unambiguous build routed to /implement-substrate and exempt from GOV-FANOUT-1, and nrem is already confirmed content-contingent (ratio 0.1445, 0/8 confounded). Experiment-layer only; zero ree_core change; the harness edits are ADDITIVE and the INJECTED arm was verified to reproduce the recorded 778c seed-42 sigma grid to 1e-13 (JSON round-trip precision), so 778/778a/778c stay comparable. Cloud-pinned so the three legs run in PARALLEL, per GOV-FANOUT-1 (a single re-posed sequential probe can inherit the prior confound and return a confident-but-wrong verdict). Smoke: dry-run PASS (self-route exercised, readiness gate live not decorative); validate_experiments --strict OK (no readiness / magnitude-vs-range warning); 1484/1484 contract tests pass (1 pre-existing unrelated SD-054 failure, verified failing without this change); ASCII-clean; per-cell arm_fingerprint (reuse-eligible mint).

items.title: SD-068 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 2/3 H-rem-genuinely-content-free: REM de-clamped readout (axis=representation)
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 discrimination portfolio on the SD-068 REM leg, leg 2 of 3 (axis=REPRESENTATION, hypothesis H-rem-genuinely-content-free, pre-registered 2026-07-18T08:41:15Z in hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json question consolidation_readout_validity). Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-778c_2026-07-18.json targets[0].fanout_recommendation. The rival reading to leg 1: the rem calibration readout is GENUINELY content-independent -- like the sws leg 778c eliminated at null_slope_ratio 1.0000 (sd 2.7e-8, 8/8) -- and the clamping is incidental, which would make rem a SECOND content-free leg and leave SD-068's non-vacuity contract carried by the nrem leg alone. PROBE: score the rem leg against the injected precision target DIRECTLY in PRECISION units (direct_precision_error = |1/rv_after - clean_target| / clean_target) instead of via running_variance_after in VARIANCE units (calibration_error = |rv_after - 1/clean_target|). Inverting back to precision UNDOES the 1/x blow-up that pinned 778c's null arm at 998.5009992509989 on 5/8 seeds and sent it off-scale 1801-9143 on 3/8: the precision-units readout is bounded and its sigma-response stays graded on both arms. Everything else is held at the EXACT 778c condition (step=1.0, zero-content null, same 8 seeds, same sigma grid, same RNG streams), so the READOUT DEFINITION is the only difference. ANTI-ALIAS: (1) WITHIN-RUN READOUT CONTROL -- the 778c readout (calibration_error) is scored on the IDENTICAL cells, so any difference is attributable to the readout definition ALONE and a de-clamped ratio near 1.0 cannot alias 'genuinely content-free' against 'this run differs from 778c'; (2) NON-DEGENERACY GATE on the NULL arm's own spread and distinct-value count -- a ratio ~0.0 is ambiguous between 'inert on noise' (the finding) and 'saturated constant' (no finding), which is exactly what left 778c unresolved, so a still-degenerate null routes to measurement_still_degenerate_requeue rather than letting a fresh degeneracy satisfy the declared null; (3) seed-stability is a REPORTED outcome -- a ceiling inside the 95% CI self-routes to an explicit ..._seed_unstable_underpowered branch rather than reading the mean as a verdict (778c's rem verdict flipped across seeds). DECLARED NULL: if the de-clamped readout yields null_slope_ratio <= 0.25, this leg is REFUTED -- the rem readout DOES track content once scored in a non-degenerate representation. Smoke observation (1 seed, toy grid): de-clamped ratio 0.9926 with null_sd 0.0270 and non_degenerate True, against the legacy anchor's off-scale 31127 -- the representation swap genuinely de-clamps. GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout is the null/injected sigma-slope ratio under a PRECISION-units error; no recorded manifest carries it (778/778a/778b/778c scored calibration_error in variance units only, and direct_precision_error did not exist before this leg) -> not recoverable by reanalysis -> run. Re-derive brake: does NOT fire (see V3-EXQ-778d note). Siblings: V3-EXQ-778d, V3-EXQ-778f. DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic -> excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring); PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING -> resolution via /failure-autopsy Step 9b Mode B against the frozen ledger, NOT by the script's self-route. SD-068 is the subject; MECH-168 / INV-047 / MECH-169 are CONTEXT only. MECH-121 deliberately NOT tagged (held, candidate/substrate_conditional; the NREM leg is substrate-plumbing-fidelity only and must not accrue promotion evidence). rem phase ONLY -- the sws repair is a single unambiguous build routed to /implement-substrate and exempt from GOV-FANOUT-1, and nrem is already confirmed content-contingent (ratio 0.1445, 0/8 confounded). Experiment-layer only; zero ree_core change; the harness edits are ADDITIVE and the INJECTED arm was verified to reproduce the recorded 778c seed-42 sigma grid to 1e-13 (JSON round-trip precision), so 778/778a/778c stay comparable. Cloud-pinned so the three legs run in PARALLEL, per GOV-FANOUT-1 (a single re-posed sequential probe can inherit the prior confound and return a confident-but-wrong verdict). Smoke: dry-run PASS (self-route exercised, readiness gate live not decorative); validate_experiments --strict OK (no readiness / magnitude-vs-range warning); 1484/1484 contract tests pass (1 pre-existing unrelated SD-054 failure, verified failing without this change); ASCII-clean; per-cell arm_fingerprint (reuse-eligible mint).

items.title: SD-068 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 3/3 H-gen-gain-content-free: REM generative gain vs content scale (axis=observation)
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 discrimination portfolio on the SD-068 REM leg, leg 3 of 3 (axis=OBSERVATION, hypothesis H-gen-gain-content-free, pre-registered 2026-07-18T08:41:15Z in hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json question consolidation_readout_validity). Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-778c_2026-07-18.json targets[0].fanout_recommendation. SCOPE GUARD (load-bearing, kept explicit in the script's HYPOTHESES / INTERPRETATION GRID blocks): this leg does NOT threaten the finding that the REM generative pass ATTENUATES (rem_generative_gain 0.149, attenuating 8/8 seeds), which STANDS and which nothing here can overturn -- the transfer function does attenuate. It tests ONLY the narrower interpretive gloss that 'correction needs an intact seed' (REE_assembly/docs/architecture/sd_068_consolidation_lesion_harness.md, the OPEN QUESTION box in the 'REM generative gain' section, flagged 2026-07-18). A result here revises a sentence of interpretation, not a measured quantity. MOTIVATION: in the 778c manifest the NULL arm's rem_generative_gain (seed 42: 0.182/0.184/0.188/0.209 across sigma) is CLOSE to the INJECTED arm's (0.165/0.166/0.172/0.190) at rem_gen_content_scale 0.0 -- i.e. with a content-free rollout seed. That sits OUTSIDE 778c's scored C1 criteria and was recorded as an open question, NOT a verdict; it is n=1-seed and unpowered, and this leg turns it into a measurement. PROBE: contrast the generative gain at rollout-seed content_scale in {0.0, 0.5, 1.0} across the 8 778a/778c seeds; test whether gain varies with content scale at all. ANTI-ALIAS: (1) THREE content scales, not two -- the intermediate 0.5 rung is what separates a genuine dose-response from a two-point step change, which a two-point contrast cannot do; (2) EFFECT-SIZE BAR scaled on the SD of the per-seed DELTA plus an absolute floor (max(0.05, 2 x SEM of the paired delta)), so a consistent-but-tiny difference cannot pass on consistency alone nor a large-but-noisy one on magnitude alone; (3) deltas are PAIRED within seed and RNG stream, so seed-to-seed variance in the transfer function itself cancels out of the contrast; (4) per-content-scale gains AND attenuation counts are recorded alongside, so the standing attenuation finding stays visible and cannot be read as overturned. DECLARED NULL: if gain scales MONOTONICALLY with content scale AND the endpoints separate beyond the bar, this leg is REFUTED and the architecture doc's 'correction needs an intact seed' gloss STANDS. Smoke observation (1 seed, toy grid): gains 0.150/0.136/0.124 across content_scale 0.0/0.5/1.0 -- monotonic but delta -0.026 BELOW the 0.05 bar, correctly self-routing to content-free rather than reading monotonicity alone as refutation, and attenuating at every scale. Independent of its siblings by construction: a DIFFERENT readout (the generative rollout) from their precision calibration. GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout is rem_generative_gain at an INTERMEDIATE content scale (0.5), carried by no recorded manifest (778c swept only 1.0 and 0.0, its 0.0 arm a single unpowered seed-42 observation), so the monotonicity test is not recoverable by reanalysis -> run. Re-derive brake: does NOT fire (see V3-EXQ-778d note). Siblings: V3-EXQ-778d, V3-EXQ-778e. DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic -> excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring); PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING -> resolution via /failure-autopsy Step 9b Mode B against the frozen ledger, NOT by the script's self-route. SD-068 is the subject; MECH-168 / INV-047 / MECH-169 are CONTEXT only. MECH-121 deliberately NOT tagged (held, candidate/substrate_conditional; the NREM leg is substrate-plumbing-fidelity only and must not accrue promotion evidence). rem phase ONLY -- the sws repair is a single unambiguous build routed to /implement-substrate and exempt from GOV-FANOUT-1, and nrem is already confirmed content-contingent (ratio 0.1445, 0/8 confounded). Experiment-layer only; zero ree_core change; the harness edits are ADDITIVE and the INJECTED arm was verified to reproduce the recorded 778c seed-42 sigma grid to 1e-13 (JSON round-trip precision), so 778/778a/778c stay comparable. Cloud-pinned so the three legs run in PARALLEL, per GOV-FANOUT-1 (a single re-posed sequential probe can inherit the prior confound and return a confident-but-wrong verdict). Smoke: dry-run PASS (self-route exercised, readiness gate live not decorative); validate_experiments --strict OK (no readiness / magnitude-vs-range warning); 1484/1484 contract tests pass (1 pre-existing unrelated SD-054 failure, verified failing without this change); ASCII-clean; per-cell arm_fingerprint (reuse-eligible mint).

items.title: MECH-063 (ii) tonic/phasic dissociation -- sample-driven stopping + sample_starvation_requeue (supersedes 779)
items.note: Implementation fix for V3-EXQ-779 per failure_autopsy_MECH-063-777-779-cluster_2026-07-18 (REE_assembly master 811e3f4948). 779's evidence_direction non_contributory was CORRECT but its self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue MISLABELLED the cause: SD-069 was wired (signal_source=instantaneous_pe) and firing (burst_level_max 1.0 in every PHASIC-ON cell), and the failed precondition (5 vs 10 event ticks) was a min-across-cells sourced entirely from ONE 19-step cell (seed 23 / T1P1). Three fixes: (1) sample-driven stopping via the shared experiments/_lib/sample_driven_rollout.py helper (autopsy routing (c)) -- each cell auto-resets across episodes until 800 selections (all arms) + 30 event / 200 quiescent ticks (PHASIC-ON), capped at 2400 env steps / 120 episodes, realised counts recorded; (2) a distinct sample_starvation_requeue self-route with the OFFENDING CELL named in each min-across-cells precondition, reserving substrate_not_ready_requeue for capability-kind failures; (3) surprise-EMA telemetry recorded against burst_level so drift-desensitisation of the purely relative trigger_ratio is checkable from the manifest (an absolute-level companion trigger would be a ree_core change -- deliberately out of scope). Readiness FLOORS unchanged from 779; only the sampling model changed, per the autopsy's explicit warning not to re-run the same design with a nudged threshold. Cloud affinity so the in-line OFF-arm mint is linux-x86_64-py3.10 class (reusable by cloud consumers). GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout at an adequate per-cell sample exists in NO recorded manifest (779 is the only run of this family and its cells are the starved data this replaces) -> run. Re-derive brake: 1 non_contributory autopsy on MECH-063, below threshold 2 -> not braked. Sibling: V3-EXQ-777a (sub-claim i). Smoke: PASS (dry-run, readiness met, label routing exercised).

items.title: MECH-459 probe R: advantage composition (pre/post standardisation) + critic calibration on BC-visited states
items.note: MECH-459 probe R, sanctioned by REE_assembly/evidence/decisions/decision_MECH-459_registry_and_brake_2026-07-18.md Decision 2b. DIAGNOSTIC on INTERMEDIATE QUANTITIES (experiment_purpose=diagnostic -> excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring); PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING -> /failure-autopsy. MECH-459 stays candidate, NARROWED: that decision's Finding V2 REFUTED the STRONG form (global reward-scale invariance is real, but none of 770/771/772 is a global rescaling, so the eliminations were NOT laundered by construction) -- the strong form is not restated. Only the WEAK form is under test: per-episode standardisation re-amplifies the every-step novelty noise (NOVELTY_COEF 0.1/sqrt(visit_count)) back to unit variance, swamping a treatment's shape change. MEASURED PATH: the reference composed-bootstrap CTRL arm (128-wide, 3x budget, z_world DETACHED, credit-replay 3/topk 32, developmental anneal 1.0->0.05, RND on) -- the SHARED control arm of 780 and 781 -- both reps (z_world + raw 5x5). NO manipulation, NO treatment arm: this MEASURES, it does not re-pose. TWO READOUTS. R-(a) advantage composition: |adv| mass fraction on forage-contact vs novelty/harm steps, logged BOTH just before adv=(adv-mean)/(std+1e-8) (mech457_explorer_classes.py:697) and just after, prevalence-normalised to a CONCENTRATION C = mass-fraction / step-fraction. PARITY-RESCALING (weak form supported) = C_pre<0.5 AND C_post>=1.0 AND delta>=0.25; STAYS-TINY (weak form falls, normaliser exonerated) = C_post<1.0 with delta<0.25; ALREADY-CONCENTRATED = C_pre>=0.5 (the weak form's premise fails). Analytic note recorded in the script: the std divide is provably |adv|-fraction-preserving, so ONLY the mean subtraction can move the composition -- mean_episode_mean_adv is emitted as the audit. R-(b) critic calibration on BC-visited states: LocalViewGreedyPolicy (48.05 @D3; the policy 748 distilled to 32.72) is rolled out against the TRAINED critic; V(s) vs realized discounted return-to-go G on the SAME reward scale the critic regressed against. COLLAPSED-TO-MEAN (MSE/bimodal half) = std(V)/std(G)<0.25 AND |mean(V)-mean(G)|<=0.5*std(G) AND separation_ratio<0.25; FLAT-UNINFORMED (signal-absence) = collapsed but NOT tracking the mean; CALIBRATED = separates. Both readouts declare BOTH evidence directions in the script's HYPOTHESES UNDER TEST / INTERPRETATION GRID blocks. SECOND, INDEPENDENT PAYOFF (Finding V3): R-(a) resolves whether a V3-EXQ-781 NULL is readable. 781's approach drive is added directly into `shaped` (explorer_classes.py:660-662), INSIDE the normaliser -- so a 781 NULL is confounded under the weak form while a 781 POSITIVE is not. 780's BC auxiliary is a LOSS-side CE term (:703-708) that never enters `shaped` and is NOT confounded either way. Emitted as headline.exq_781_null_readable; decision-relevant WITHIN 781's runtime, which no other pending work delivers. LIVE PORTFOLIO UNTOUCHED: V3-EXQ-780 (claimed ree-cloud-2) and V3-EXQ-781 (claimed ree-cloud-3) are NOT modified, and neither are mech457_explorer_classes.py / mech457_bootstrap_explorer.py / mech457_fanout.py -- the instrumentation is a SEPARATE mirror module experiments/_lib/mech459_probe_r.py, precisely so the live portfolio's bytes, substrate_hash and running processes are undisturbed (git status confirms zero mech457_* modifications). substrate_queue entry mech457_competence_bootstrap_explorer stays blocked_pending_discrimination. RE-DERIVE BRAKE: does NOT fire. MECH-459's substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsy count is 0, and a diagnostic discriminating WHY a ceiling holds is named not-braked; no config/env/credit/capacity knob is moved. Separately, Decision 2a ruled the normaliser knock-out (probe K) PERMITTED by the brake but the WRONG FIRST SPEND (it tests only the weak form, and a knock-out null is compatible with signal-absence too) -- K is HELD, NOT queued. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readouts are per-step |adv| mass fractions either side of the standardiser and trained-critic V vs realized return on demonstrator-visited states -- INTERMEDIATE TRAINING QUANTITIES recorded by no manifest (grep over evidence/experiments/*.json for advantage_composition / critic_calibration / pre_standardisation returns nothing; 770/771/772/780/781 record only end-of-run competence + guard aggregates) -> not recoverable by reanalysis -> run. READINESS (same-statistic per criterion): anchors local_view_greedy + greedy_oracle clear the 1.0 floor @D3; R-(a) is COUNT-gated so the readiness check is a COUNT (>=30 forage steps in the measured window per cell -- with too few, a 'stays tiny' reading is vacuous, not falsifying); R-(b) is SPREAD-gated so the readiness check is a SPREAD (std(return-to-go) over demonstrator-visited states >= 0.25). Below any floor -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a substrate-verdict label). CONDITIONAL FOLLOW-ONS (pre-registered, not queued now): parity signature -> queue probe K AND register H-return-scale (axis normalisation-pathway) under question competence_floor in hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json via a LABELLED fanout_growth_events[] entry citing decision_MECH-459_registry_and_brake_2026-07-18.md as fanout_source, reporting the surviving ratio BOTH ways (vs the ORIGINAL frozen count 7 and the CURRENT count 12 -> 13) per labelled_fanout_growth; stays-tiny or already-concentrated -> do NOT queue probe K, NO registry write (counts stay 7/12), route MECH-459 to weakened. Probe R is explicitly NOT the adjudicating run for H-return-scale (that is a later competence-LIFTING experiment), so registering after this run still satisfies pre_registered_utc <= resolved_utc. Dry-run PASS (both readouts fire end-to-end; readiness correctly UNMET on the toy budget -> substrate_not_ready_requeue, proving the gate is live not decorative; 5 verdict lines; ep N/M denominator = loop bound); validate_experiments --strict OK (no readiness / magnitude-vs-range warning); 28/28 mech457 + arm_fingerprint contract tests pass; ASCII-clean; per-cell arm_fingerprint (reuse-eligible mint, include_driver_script_in_hash=False).

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 H-bc-prior: competence-directed behavioral-prior (imitation) discrimination
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 MECH-457 discrimination portfolio leg (H-bc-prior, axis=learning-signal), routed by failure_autopsy_MECH-457-fanout-770-771-772_2026-07-18 (770/771/772 drive/reward/credit all FAILED their pre-registered nulls; combined with 769 capacity-falsified, FOUR axes eliminated; the learned actor-critic converter cannot extract a competent policy from a provably-sufficient observation). DIAGNOSTIC (excluded from governance scoring); PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING -> /failure-autopsy adjudication, read jointly with sibling V3-EXQ-781 (H-approach-primitive). RE-DERIVE BRAKE FIRED (7 prior non_contributory MECH-457 autopsies) but PERMITS this: NEW EXQ number on a DIFFERENT mechanism class (learning-signal), the GOV-FANOUT-1 route the 770/771/772 autopsy re_derive_brake.route_to names (same sanction as 769->770/771/772); the brake refuses only another config/env/credit/capacity same-axis re-pose. Pre-registered ALIVE as H-bc-prior in hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json (competence_floor). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout (foraging_competence @D3 of a BC-SEEDED composed bootstrap) absent from every prior manifest (748 was pure BC without the composed bootstrap; 770/771/772 manipulated other axes) -> run. Manipulation = a competence-directed BEHAVIORAL PRIOR: BC warm-start (300 ep of imitation of the floor-clearing local_view_greedy demonstrator, 48.05 on the learner's own 5x5 view) + persistent imitation auxiliary (bc_aux_coef=0.5), added to the NON-regressed reference build (128-wide/3x/z_world-detached; NOT the 769-falsified 256/5x). ctrl = the same reference build with NO BC (== the 770 ctrl). Both reps (z_world + raw 5x5). COVARIATES: post_bc_foraging_competence separates 'seed never took' from 'seed erased by RL'; raw-vs-z_world separates representation-riding from bootstrap-content failure. NULL: even imitation-seeded the actor collapses to passive-survival both reps -> a learned behavioral prior is NOT the axis (removes H-bc-prior); does NOT weaken MECH-457. Anti-alias vs 781: this leg is DEMONSTRATOR-based (supervised imitation); 781 is demonstrator-free. MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending; INV-088 re-routes onto the portfolio outcome. Dry-run PASS (BC warm-start + post-BC eval + BC aux fire; 7 verdict lines; readiness_met; non_degenerate); validate_experiments --strict OK; 11/11 mech457_bootstrap_explorer contract tests pass; ASCII-clean; per-cell arm_fingerprint (reuse-eligible mint). Pinned ree-cloud-2 (linux class; parallel with 781 on ree-cloud-3).

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 H-approach-primitive: innate non-extinguishing demonstrator-free approach-drive discrimination
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 MECH-457 discrimination portfolio leg (H-approach-primitive, axis=intrinsic-architecture), routed by failure_autopsy_MECH-457-fanout-770-771-772_2026-07-18. DIAGNOSTIC (excluded from governance scoring); PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING -> /failure-autopsy adjudication, read jointly with sibling V3-EXQ-780 (H-bc-prior). RE-DERIVE BRAKE FIRED (7 prior non_contributory MECH-457 autopsies) but PERMITS this: NEW EXQ number on a DIFFERENT mechanism class (intrinsic architecture), the GOV-FANOUT-1 route the 770/771/772 autopsy names (same sanction as 769->770/771/772); the brake refuses only another config/env/credit/capacity same-axis re-pose. Pre-registered ALIVE as H-approach-primitive in hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json (competence_floor). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout (foraging_competence @D3 of an APPROACH-DRIVEN composed bootstrap) absent from every prior manifest -> run. Manipulation = an innate, NON-EXTINGUISHING, DEMONSTRATOR-FREE appetitive resource-proximity drive (constant-coef intrinsic reward = peak resource_field_view value, approach_coef=1.0), added to the NON-regressed reference build (128-wide/3x/z_world-detached; NOT the 769-falsified 256/5x). ctrl = the same reference build with NO approach drive (== the 770 ctrl). Both reps (z_world + raw 5x5). ANTI-ALIAS: DEMONSTRATOR-FREE (avoids aliasing the 780 imitation leg); a STATE reward (not a policy-invariant Ng-1999 potential difference -> distinct from the eliminated H3 credit leg 772); NON-EXTINGUISHING (distinct from the self-attenuating RND/SD-025 novelty class). COVARIATE: mean_approach_reward_recent confirms the drive fired (a null with a live drive is informative, not a plumbing bug); raw-vs-z_world separates representation-riding from bootstrap-content failure. NULL: even with a sustained approach drive the actor stays in passive-survival both reps -> an approach drive is NOT the axis (removes H-approach-primitive), the missing piece is the learned imitation dependency (780); does NOT weaken MECH-457. MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending; INV-088 re-routes onto the portfolio outcome. Dry-run PASS (approach drive fires, approach_reward ~0.75-0.82; 7 verdict lines; readiness_met; non_degenerate); validate_experiments --strict OK; 11/11 mech457_bootstrap_explorer contract tests pass; ASCII-clean; per-cell arm_fingerprint (reuse-eligible mint). Pinned ree-cloud-3 (linux class; parallel with 780 on ree-cloud-2).

items.title: z_world under-differentiation: separate untrained-encoder (a1) from the world_dim=32 granularity ceiling (a2) via a 2x2 dim x training crossing
items.note: z_world under-differentiation: separates (a1) untrained-encoder from (a2) the world_dim=32 discriminative-granularity ceiling. DIAGNOSTIC -- discriminates WHY z_world is under-differentiated; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING, excluded from governance scoring. Runs the USER-CONFIRMED retest spec of failure_autopsy_zworld-integration-cluster_2026-06-06.md section 7 (world_dim=128 + a behaviourally-balanced exploratory policy, re-measuring event selectivity + counterfactual attribution + fine-vs-coarse residue accuracy together), extended to cross {dim 32,128} x {encoder untrained, trained} -- which is what actually separates (a1) from (a2), since every cell measured on 2026-07-18 was dim=32 AND untrained and the two were perfectly confounded. 4 arms x 8 seeds. UNBLOCKED BY SD-070 (ree-v3 main f418400, 2026-07-18). This experiment was authored on 2026-07-18 and deliberately NOT queued, because the P0 the substrate then prescribed (SD-009 event-contrastive CE + SD-018 MSE, online batch=1) was measured to COLLAPSE z_world to participation ratio ~1.06 at world_dim=128 (untrained 9.21). Its TRAINED arms would have produced a collapsed representation whose necessarily-low contrast ratio says 'the recipe destroyed the manifold', NOT 'the dim=32 ceiling holds' -- exactly the trivial-prediction signature its own anti-collapse readiness assert exists to catch. The TRAINED arms now run the SD-070 recipe instead (static scene-structure grounding targets + class-balanced CE + VICReg variance/covariance anti-collapse + mini-batching), which was validated AGAINST THIS HARNESS'S OWN GATE before adoption: retained_fraction 0.625 (needs >=0.50), absolute PR 5.079 (needs >=2.0), contrast ratio raised 3/3 seeds (0.137 -> 0.238), held-out balanced-accuracy lift +0.23 to +0.47 on all four grounding heads. The gate is RETAINED AT FULL STRENGTH, not relaxed: an off-line validation still has to clear it in-run, on 8 seeds, at both dims. SELF-ROUTES to substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a substrate verdict) if readiness fails on any of: raw-channel contrast degenerate, a TRAINED arm's encoder weights not moving, P1 leaking gradient into the encoder, or a TRAINED arm collapsing. SCOPE: bears on INV-088's ANTECEDENT only -- NOT tagged for the INV-088 coupling leg (V3-EXQ-744a's WEAKENS reading stands), NO bearing on MECH-459 / return-scale, and NO bearing on either leg of the live GOV-FANOUT-1 discrimination (V3-EXQ-780 H-bc-prior vs V3-EXQ-781 H-approach-primitive) -- both remain claimed and that discrimination stays open. Does NOT tag SD-009 or MECH-100: SD-070 routes around SD-009 rather than adjudicating it (see evidence/planning/sd009_event_contrastive_channel_mismatch_2026-07-18.md). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is z_world contrast ratio under a TRAINED encoder; reanalysis_query returned NO substrate-compatible match (no recorded run measures contrast under a trained encoder at either dim) -> run. RE-DERIVE BRAKE: Q-002 count 1, SD-031 count 0, neither braked. VALIDATION: validate_experiments --strict OK; validate_queue OK; 31 SD-070 contracts + full suite 1590 pass; dry-run smoke PASS on all 4 arms. Mints a cross-driver reusable OFF-arm baseline (experiments/_lib/baselines/exq783_zworld_granularity.py, include_driver_script_in_hash=False).
